name: snapdini-tests
description: Top-level test/dev runner for Snapdini (app = Express/TS backend, web = SvelteKit frontend).

scripts.typecheck: (cd app && npm run typecheck) && (cd web && npm run check)
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts._comment: test:integration + test:e2e need the dev stack running (docker compose -f app/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d). test:load is run manually.
